config.planId: REPLACE-short-lowercase-slug (becomes the folder name and URL: plans/<planId>/)

contextProfile.targetGoal: One-line end goal (shown in the header and Journey tab)

careerPaths.title: Path title (1-3 paths; 3 fits the desktop layout best)
careerPaths.description: 2-3 sentence pitch for this career path.

skillMatrix.group: core (must match the `group` of at least one daily block below; logged hours flow from blocks to skills through this)
skillMatrix.necessity: Mandatory | Highly Valued | Auxiliary (Mandatory renders a stronger bar)
skillMatrix.competentB2: 50 hrs (first milestone tick; or 'Already Competent' for no tick)

dailyOperationalCadence.duration: 1.5h (durations of all blocks should sum to config.dailyGoalHours)
dailyOperationalCadence.category: Block name (2-6 blocks; each renders as a loggable card)
dailyOperationalCadence.group: core (which skill group these hours count toward)

months.title: Month theme (one entry per month; any count, 6 is typical)
months.goal: What done looks like at the end of this month.

focusAreas.label: Short label
focusAreas.text: Resources / books / modules for this area this month.

focusAreas.label: Another area
focusAreas.text: Any number of rows, any labels.

months.dailyTask: The daily deliverable sentence shown on the Today view.
